Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Written Discovery Responses From Owner Defts
Off Calendar Jul-28-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Erick Mcfarland, Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: 46 Geary Street, LLC
No appearance stated by plaintiff's attorney.

After hearing, tentative ruling is adopted as modified. PLAINTIFF ACCO ENGINEERED SYSTEMS, INC.'s Motion to Compel Written Discovery Responses from Owner Defendants is GRANTED. No opposition has been filed. Responses to form interrogatories, request for production of documents may be served within 10 days of the date of this hearing. Request that the truth of any matters specified in the requests be deemed admitted pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure Section 2033.280(b) is GRANTED. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $1,665.00 pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure Sections 2023.010(d), 2030.290(c), and 2033.280(c).s Judge: MONICA A. WILEY, not reported.
